sentences.arabic: كِتَابُ "كَلِيلَة وَدِمْنَة" هُوَ مَجْمُوعَةٌ مِنَ الْقِصَصِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga "Kalila i Dimna" je zbirka starih priča.
sentences.translationEn: The book "Kalila and Dimna" is a collection of ancient stories.

sentences.arabic: تَتَحَدَّثُ الْحَيَوَانَاتُ فِي هَذِهِ الْقِصَصِ مِثْلَ الْبَشَرِ.
sentences.translation: Životinje u ovim pričama govore poput ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: Animals in these stories speak like humans.

sentences.arabic: تَهْدِفُ هَذِهِ الْحِكَايَاتُ إِلَى تَعْلِيمِ النَّاسِ الْحِكْمَةَ وَالْأَخْلَاقَ.
sentences.translation: Ove priče imaju za cilj podučiti ljude mudrosti i moralu.
sentences.translationEn: These tales aim to teach people wisdom and morals.

sentences.arabic: تَرْجَمَ ابْنُ الْمُقَفَّعِ هَذَا الْكِتَابَ إِلَى اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ibn al-Muqaffa je preveo ovu knjigu na arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: Ibn al-Muqaffa translated this book into the Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ الْأَطْفَالُ وَالْكِبَارُ هَذِهِ الْقِصَصَ حَتَّى الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca i odrasli čitaju ove priče i danas.
sentences.translationEn: Children and adults read these stories to this day.
